name: Osiris
brief: for the launch of 'Osiris', a portable solar-powered phone charger. Brand palette: warm amber, matte black, off-white. Style: clean product photography, natural light, lifestyle context, premium minimalist design. Brand text where appropriate: 'OSIRIS - Power from the sun'.
logo_prompt: Design the official brand logo for 'Osiris', a portable solar-powered phone charger. A flat, iconic sun-over-horizon mark with the wordmark 'OSIRIS' beneath it. Palette: warm amber mark, matte black text, off-white background. Clean vector style, centered, no photography, no extra text.

scenes.hero: hero image: the product resting on a sunlit hiking trail
scenes.instagram: Instagram post: lifestyle flat-lay with the product and travel gear
scenes.x_banner: X/Twitter banner: macro product detail across a wide composition
scenes.story: Story/Reel card: vertical lifestyle shot, product in hand outdoors
scenes.email_header: email header: slim newsletter announcement banner with negative space
scenes.appstore: App Store screenshot: the companion app UI on a phone, feature callout
scenes.og_card: OG preview card: link-share thumbnail, product centered, room for title
scenes.print_ad: print ad: magazine full-page composition with generous margins
